subcodes.first_line: O thou whose face is radiant and whose heart is luminous! May God perfume thy senses with His holy fragrances and pour upon thee that which overflows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابهر الوجه و انور القلب عطر الله مشامک بنفحات قدسه و طفح علیک ما یترشح
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
